title: onobrychis bungei
intro: Onobrychis bungei, also known as Bunge's clover or yellow melilot, is a plant species in the legume family native to Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis bungei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis bungei can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
